name: Construction Safety AI
note: Estimates based on Azure retail pricing. Actual costs depend on usage, region, reserved instances, and enterprise agreements.

services.name: Azure AI Vision
services.purpose: Real-time PPE compliance detection (hard hats, vests, gloves), hazard identification, unauthorized zone intrusion alerts from site camera feeds

services.name: Azure IoT Hub
services.purpose: Ingest video streams, wearable sensor data (worker location, fall detection), environmental sensors (dust, noise, gas levels), equipment telemetry

services.name: Azure OpenAI
services.purpose: GPT-4o for incident analysis — root cause narratives, safety report generation, hazard pattern correlation, natural language safety briefings

services.name: Container Apps
services.purpose: Safety monitoring API — video frame analysis orchestration, alert routing, dashboard backend, compliance reporting engine

services.name: Cosmos DB
services.purpose: Safety incidents, PPE violation records, worker zone tracking, sensor readings, inspection logs, compliance audit trail

prod.note: Dedicated throughput, TTL on sensor telemetry

enterprise.note: Multi-region, analytical store for trend analysis

services.name: Event Hubs
services.purpose: High-throughput video frame and sensor event ingestion — buffering camera feeds for real-time processing with ordered partitioning by site zone

services.name: Key Vault
services.purpose: Camera credentials, IoT device certificates, OSHA reporting API keys, worker PII encryption keys

services.name: Application Insights
services.purpose: Alert latency, detection accuracy, camera feed health, API throughput, model drift, false-positive rates

optimization_tips: Process video at 1-2 FPS instead of full frame rate — PPE detection doesn't require 30fps and reducing frame rate cuts Vision API costs by 90%
Use edge AI modules (Azure IoT Edge with custom Vision containers) for initial screening — only send flagged frames to cloud Vision for confirmation, reducing bandwidth and API calls by 70%
Use GPT-4o-mini for routine daily safety summaries, reserve GPT-4o for complex multi-incident root cause analysis and regulatory report generation — saves 65% on AI costs
Implement TTL policies on Cosmos DB sensor telemetry — raw readings expire after 30 days while aggregated safety metrics are retained long-term
Schedule non-critical analytics (trend reports, model retraining) during off-peak hours using Azure Functions consumption plan — construction sites have natural off-hours windows
Set Azure Cost Management budgets with alerts at 50%, 80%, 100%
